backlog.title: Home Assistant VM Access
backlog.description: Establish reliable access to the Home Assistant OS virtual machine so live dashboard implementation can begin.

backlog.title: Lead Pipeline Backend
backlog.description: Add real submission capture, storage, and routing for PittsburghDivorce attorney leads.

inProgress.title: Mealie Shared Collections
inProgress.description: Canonical recipe sharing, scoped comments, and demo flow are being built out.

inProgress.title: Mission Control UI
inProgress.description: Turning the static concept into a real dashboard with data-driven panels and a cron calendar.

inProgress.title: PittsburghDivorce Site
inProgress.description: Front-end concept is live; next work is capture, routing, and qualification logic.

waitingApproval.title: Kitchen Dashboard Buildout
waitingApproval.description: Hero Meal First design is approved visually. Waiting on HA VM access before implementing live.

waitingApproval.title: Mealie Demo Direction
waitingApproval.description: Need approval on what counts as the first public/demo-ready milestone for the Mealie fork.

done.title: Kitchen Dashboard Demo
done.description: Hero Meal First concept refined and approved through the live preview container.

done.title: Worker System Plan
done.description: Planner, researcher, UI, engineer, backup, and security worker roles defined and scaffolded.

approvals.title: Home Assistant VM access path
approvals.description: Needed before moving the approved kitchen dashboard into the live Home Assistant OS instance.

approvals.title: Mealie implementation slice
approvals.description: Permission hardening, copy-to-household flow, and demo checkpoint scope.

approvals.title: PittsburghDivorce backend scope
approvals.description: Decide whether to route leads to email, CRM, sheet, or a custom admin queue first.

approvals.title: Mission Control data source plan
approvals.description: Choose whether this should be manually managed JSON first or connected to a real store right away.

agents.name: Planner / Supervisor
agents.detail: Coordinating Mealie, Mission Control, UI, and lead-gen work.

agents.name: UI / Frontend
agents.detail: Kitchen dashboard direction approved and ready for implementation planning.

agents.name: Software Engineer
agents.detail: Building demos, scaffolding Mealie, and preparing deeper implementation work.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.detail: Available for legal intake research, product comparisons, or implementation references.

agents.name: Backup Auditor
agents.detail: Restore drills and backup monitoring have not been automated yet.

agents.name: Security / Repo Auditor
agents.detail: Conceptually defined, but not yet fully wired into enforcement or automation.

heartbeats.title: Kitchen Dashboard
heartbeats.description: Approved visually. Next step is live Home Assistant implementation once access is available.

heartbeats.title: Mealie Shared Collections
heartbeats.description: Scaffolding exists. Needs a stronger demo cut and more permission hardening.

heartbeats.title: PittsburghDivorce
heartbeats.description: Front-end is live as a concept. Lead capture backend still needs to be built.

cronJobs.name: archive-cleanup:home-assistant-legacy-delete
cronJobs.description: Two-week reminder to delete the archived Home Assistant legacy folder if it is no longer needed.
